## 📋 Today's Overview
*June 08, 2026*

### Superconductivity (7 new today)

1. The study focuses on an asymmetric quantum-dot Josephson junction with a biased top gate, employing a theoretical proposal to address/solve the realization of a superconducting triode effect for non-dissipative rectification.
2. The study focuses on spin-triplet superconducting channels, employing a minimal Ginzburg-Landau theory with two coupled order parameters to address/solve the mechanism of reentrant superconductivity in strong magnetic fields.
3. The study focuses on a nonequilibrium superconducting diode, employing a 2.4 GHz flip-flop device design to address/solve the challenge of achieving high working frequency operation in superconducting diodes.
4. The study focuses on paired states in a generic multiband Hubbard model, employing an exact effective-mass theorem for two-body bound states and its many-body counterpart to address/solve the role of quantum geometry in Cooper pairs beyond single-particle band geometry.
5. The study focuses on the 2D electron gas at KTaO3 heterostructures, employing a pairing mechanism via exchange of the soft transverse optic phonon mode (Slater mode) to address/solve the orientation-dependent superconducting transition temperature.
6. The study focuses on strained superconducting transition metal dichalcogenides (MoS2), employing a theoretical analysis of nonreciprocal charge transport to address/solve the magnetochiral anisotropy in the superconducting state.
7. The study focuses on a superconducting non-volatile memory device, employing charge trapping and gate-controlled supercurrent to address/solve the long-standing bottleneck of matching conventional semiconductor memory performance.

### spin glass (0 new today)

| 1 | **[Superconducting triode effect in a quantum-dot Josephson junction with a biased top gate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06465v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Non-reciprocal supercurrents enable non-dissipative rectification, holding great promise for superconducting electronics. Conventionally, this non-reciprocity, termed the superconducting diode effect, requires the simultaneous breaking of time-reversal and parity symmetries. Here, we propose a superconducting triode effect in an asymmetric quantum-dot Josephson junction coupled to an additional metallic top gate, which breaks the parity symmetry while explicitly preserving time-reversal symmetry. We demonstrate that the supercurrent across this junction exhibits a strong non-reciprocal effect that can be continuously manipulated via the top gate to achieve an ideal unidirectional supercurrent, thus manifesting a superconducting triode effect. Furthermore, under radio-frequency radiation, this junction exhibits highly asymmetric Shapiro steps, realizing fully quantized supercurrent rectification. Our work not only provides an alternative physical mechanism for the superconducting diode effect observed in Josephson junctions with explicit time-reversal symmetry, but also introduces a new tuning knob to manipulate supercurrent non-reciprocity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>非互易超电流能够实现无耗散整流，为超导电子学带来了巨大前景。传统上，这种被称为超导二极管效应的非互易性需要同时打破时间反演对称性和宇称对称性。在此，我们提出了一种在非对称量子点约瑟夫森结中实现的超导三极管效应，该结与一个额外的金属顶栅耦合，顶栅打破了宇称对称性，同时明确地保持了时间反演对称性。我们证明，穿过该结的超电流表现出强烈的非互易效应，可以通过顶栅连续调控，从而实现理想的单向超电流，这体现了超导三极管效应。此外，在射频辐射下，该结表现出高度不对称的夏皮罗台阶，实现了完全量子化的超电流整流。我们的工作不仅为在具有明确时间反演对称性的约瑟夫森结中观察到的超导二极管效应提供了一种替代的物理机制，而且还引入了一个新的调控旋钮来操纵超电流的非互易性。</p></details> | 2026-06-04 | Yu-Hang Li et al. |
| 2 | **[Reentrant Superconductivity from Competing Spin-Triplet Instabilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.23954v4)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Reentrant superconductivity in strong magnetic fields challenges the conventional expectation that magnetic fields necessarily suppress superconductivity. We show that reentrant superconducting instability can arise from the competition between spin-unpolarized and spin-polarized superconducting channels. Using a minimal Ginzburg--Landau theory with two coupled spin-triplet order parameters, we demonstrate that a magnetic field can reorganize the hierarchy of superconducting instabilities, yielding a characteristic reentrant instability curve over a broad parameter range.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>强磁场中的重返超导现象挑战了磁场必然抑制超导的传统预期。我们证明，重返超导不稳定性可能源于自旋非极化与自旋极化超导通道之间的竞争。利用一个包含两个耦合自旋三重态序参量的最小金茨堡-朗道理论，我们证明磁场可以重组超导不稳定性的层级结构，从而在一个广泛的参数范围内产生特征性的重返不稳定性曲线。</p></details> | 2026-06-04 | Jun Goryo et al. |
| 3 | **[2.4 GHz Flip-flop Device within Nonequilibrium Superconducting Diode](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06152v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting diode effect exhibits asymmetric critical supercurrent and has profound implications for condensed matter physics. The technical appeals of such superconducting diodes are their ultrahigh on-off ratio and diode efficiency for superconducting electronics owing to the dissipationless supercurrent therein. However, realizing superconducting diode operation at high working frequency, which is a key requirement for practical applications, remains elusive and challenging. Here, we demonstrate a polarity-controllable superconducting diode with non-equilibrium Josephson junction and its edge-triggered flip-flop operation at a high frequency up to 2.4 GHz, within a van der Waals superconductor 2M-WS$_2$. By simply tuning the thickness of superconducting 2M-WS$_2$ nanoflakes to engineer inversion asymmetry in the junction, we achieve a high diode efficiency of 67% and an on-off ratio exceeding 10$^5$. Importantly, the pulse width and duty cycle of output pulse signals in such superconducting diode flip-flop devices can be controlled in a broadband frequency range crossing 12 orders of magnitude. Theoretical analysis reveals that the non-equilibrium dynamic nature of supercurrent in these Josephson junctions enables such a high diode operating frequency and the polarity control of supercurrent. The 2.4 GHz non-equilibrium Josephson diode developed here provides a promising platform for advanced superconducting logic circuits and broadband telecommunication applications.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导二极管效应展现出非对称的临界超电流，并对凝聚态物理具有深远意义。此类超导二极管的技术吸引力在于，由于其内部的无耗散超电流，它们具有超高的开关比和二极管效率，适用于超导电子学。然而，实现高频工作下的超导二极管操作——这是实际应用的关键要求——仍然难以实现且充满挑战。在此，我们展示了一种具有非平衡约瑟夫森结的极性可控超导二极管，及其在范德瓦尔斯超导体2M-WS₂中高达2.4 GHz频率下的边沿触发触发器操作。通过简单地调控超导2M-WS₂纳米片的厚度来设计结中的反演不对称性，我们实现了67%的高二极管效率和超过10⁵的开关比。重要的是，在这种超导二极管触发器器件中，输出脉冲信号的脉冲宽度和占空比可以在跨越12个数量级的宽带频率范围内进行控制。理论分析揭示，这些约瑟夫森结中超电流的非平衡动态特性使得如此高的二极管工作频率和超电流的极性控制成为可能。这里开发的2.4 GHz非平衡约瑟夫森二极管为先进的超导逻辑电路和宽带电信应用提供了一个有前景的平台。</p></details> | 2026-06-04 | Xiangyu Bi et al. |
| 4 | **[Superconductivity beyond band geometry: emergence of pair quantum geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.06017v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Quantum geometry shapes the effective mass of Bloch particles through the geometric properties of single-particle states. Here we show that this principle extends to paired states. Starting from a generic multiband Hubbard model, we derive an exact effective-mass theorem for two-body bound states and its many-body counterpart for Cooper pairs near the critical temperature within Gaussian fluctuation theory. In both cases, the inverse effective mass separates into a ``conventional'' band-structure contribution and a new geometric contribution, pair quantum geometry, governed by quantum metrics on the pairing manifold, which becomes nontrivial when pairing is non-uniform across sublattices. In the many-body setting, analytic continuation renders the fluctuation kernel non-Hermitian, producing a biorthogonal pair geometry and a generally complex Cooper-pair effective mass whose imaginary part reflects Landau damping. Exact calculations on one-, two-, and three-dimensional lattice models show that pair quantum geometry can make quantitatively significant contributions to the effective mass. These results establish pair quantum geometry as a fundamental ingredient of superconductivity beyond conventional band geometry.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子几何通过单粒子态的几何性质来塑造布洛赫粒子的有效质量。在此我们证明，这一原理可推广到配对态。从一个通用的多能带哈伯德模型出发，我们推导出了双粒子束缚态的精确有效质量定理，以及在高斯涨落理论框架下，临界温度附近库珀对的多体对应定理。在这两种情况下，逆有效质量都分解为“常规”的能带结构贡献和一个新的几何贡献——配对量子几何，后者由配对流形上的量子度量决定，当配对在子晶格间非均匀时，该贡献变得非平凡。在多体情形下，解析延拓使得涨落核变为非厄米的，从而产生双正交配对几何和一个通常为复数的库珀对有效质量，其虚部反映了朗道阻尼。在一维、二维和三维晶格模型上的精确计算表明，配对量子几何可以对有效质量做出数量级上显著的贡献。这些结果确立了配对量子几何作为超越常规能带几何的超导基本要素。</p></details> | 2026-06-04 | Mehmet Akif Keskiner et al. |
| 5 | **[Superconductivity from the Slater mode: Application to KTaO3 heterostructures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.10903v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconductivity has been observed for the 2D electron gas (2DEG) at the interface of KTaO3 with other oxides, with a transition temperature about an order of magnitude higher than its 3d cousin SrTiO3. The superconducting transition temperature is strongly dependent on the orientation of the interface. Motivated by this observation, we study pairing due to exchange of the soft transverse optic phonon mode characteristic of quantum paraelectrics and use the resulting theory to comment on the nature of superconductivity of this 2DEG. We find (1) an orientation dependence consistent with experiment along with an anisotropic gap function, but (2) a BCS coupling constant that is smaller than needed and so must be augmented by contributions from other phonons to be consistent with the observed values of Tc.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在KTaO₃与其他氧化物的界面处的二维电子气中已观测到超导现象，其转变温度比其三维同类材料SrTiO₃高出约一个数量级。超导转变温度强烈依赖于界面的取向。受此观察启发，我们研究了由量子顺电体特有的软横向光学声子模式交换引起的配对，并利用所得理论来评述该二维电子气超导的性质。我们发现：(1) 与实验一致的取向依赖性以及各向异性的能隙函数，但 (2) 其BCS耦合常数小于所需值，因此必须通过来自其他声子的贡献来增强，才能与观测到的Tc值相符。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | M. R. Norman et al. |
| 6 | **[Magnetochiral anisotropy in strained superconducting transition metal dichalcogenides](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.05302v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We present a theoretical study of nonreciprocal charge transport in two-dimensional noncentrosymmetric superconductors, focusing on transition-metal dichalcogenide MoS$_2$ as a representative example. In the normal state, the electrical response of a material to the relative orientation of the current and magnetic field is suppressed to leading order in the symmetry-breaking perturbations. In the vicinity of the superconducting transition, magnetochiral anisotropy is strongly enhanced. We consider contributions to the nonreciprocal current originating from order-parameter fluctuations and quantum-interference processes. These terms are linked to higher-order Lifshitz invariants generically allowed in the Ginzburg-Landau free energy of superconductors with broken inversion and time-reversal symmetries. We further show that strain enables additional vector components in the nonlinear current response.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出了二维非中心对称超导体中非互易电荷输运的理论研究，以过渡金属二硫族化物MoS₂作为代表性示例。在正常态下，材料对电流与磁场相对取向的电响应在对称性破缺微扰的领头阶被抑制。在超导转变附近，磁手性各向异性显著增强。我们考虑了源于序参量涨落和量子干涉过程的非互易电流贡献。这些项与在破缺反演对称性和时间反演对称性的超导体的金兹堡-朗道自由能中普遍允许的高阶利夫希茨不变量相关联。我们进一步表明，应变能够在非线性电流响应中引入额外的矢量分量。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Joaquim Telles de Miranda et al. |
| 7 | **[Benchmarking Quantum Computers via Protocols, Comparing Superconducting and Ion-Trap Quantum Technology](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.27397v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Both Superconducting and Ion-Trap are leading quantum architectures common in the current landscape of the quantum computing field, each with distinct characteristics and operational constraints. Understanding and measuring the underlying \underline{quantumness} of these devices is essential for assessing their readiness for practical applications and guiding future progress and research. Building on earlier work (Meirom, Mor and Weinstein Arxiv 2505.12441), we utilize a benchmarking strategy applicable for comparing these two architectures by measuring "quantumness" directly on optimal sub-chips. Distinct from existing metrics, our approach employs rigorous binary fidelity thresholds derived from the classical limits of state transfer. This enables us to definitively establish quantum advantage of a designated sub-region. Here we apply this quality assurance methodology to platforms from both technologies. This comparison provides a protocol-based evaluation of quantumness advantage, revealing not only the strengths and weaknesses of each tested chip and its sub-chips but also offering a common language for their assessment. By abstracting away technical differences in the final result, we demonstrate a benchmarking strategy that bridges the gap between disparate quantum-circuit technologies, enabling fair performance comparisons and establishing a critical foundation for evaluating future claims of quantum advantage. This work was made possible by policies of two companies who enable independent and objective assessment on their quantum computers and sub-chips. In the name of science, we encourage other companies to emulate the independent qubit availability and the fair pricing which allow researchers to preform such assessments.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导和离子阱都是当前量子计算领域常见的领先量子架构，各自具有不同的特性和操作约束。理解和测量这些设备底层的“量子性”，对于评估其实际应用就绪度以及指导未来进展和研究至关重要。基于前期工作（Meirom, Mor and Weinstein Arxiv 2505.12441），我们采用一种基准测试策略，通过直接在最优子芯片上测量“量子性”来比较这两种架构。与现有指标不同，我们的方法采用了源自状态转移经典极限的严格二元保真度阈值。这使我们能够明确地确定指定子区域的量子优势。在此，我们将这种质量保证方法应用于来自两种技术的平台。这种比较提供了一种基于协议的量子优势评估，不仅揭示了每个被测芯片及其子芯片的优缺点，还为它们的评估提供了一种通用语言。通过在最终结果中抽象掉技术差异，我们展示了一种弥合不同量子电路技术之间差距的基准测试策略，从而能够进行公平的性能比较，并为评估未来关于量子优势的声明奠定关键基础。这项工作得益于两家公司的政策，它们允许对其量子计算机和子芯片进行独立客观的评估。以科学的名义，我们鼓励其他公司效仿，提供独立的量子比特可用性和公平定价，使研究人员能够进行此类评估。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Nitay Mayo et al. |
| 8 | **[First-Principles Calculation of Superconducting $T_c$ in Superhard B-C-N Metals](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.02104v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We perform first-principles electron-phonon calculations to evaluate the superconducting transition temperature $T_c$ for ternary superhard metals B$_2$C$_3$N and B$_4$C$_5$N$_3$. An ambient-pressure $T_c$ of $\sim 40$ K and $\sim 20$ K is obtained respectively for B$_2$C$_3$N and B$_4$C$_5$N$_3$ from the Eliashberg gap equations. The relatively high $T_c$ of these compounds is due in part to their high Debye temperatures associated with superhardness. The materials under study are potentially synthesizable, as their formation energies are comparable to those of other recently synthesized superhard B-C-N compounds. Therefore, studying superhard metals could hold the promise of realizing new higher-$T_c$ superconductors at ambient pressure.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们进行了第一性原理电子-声子计算，以评估三元超硬金属B₂C₃N和B₄C₅N₃的超导转变温度$T_c$。根据Eliashberg间隙方程，B₂C₃N和B₄C₅N₃在常压下分别获得了约40 K和约20 K的$T_c$。这些化合物相对较高的$T_c$部分归因于其与超硬度相关的高德拜温度。所研究的材料具有潜在的可合成性，因为它们的形成能与最近合成的其他超硬B-C-N化合物相当。因此，研究超硬金属有望在常压下实现新的更高$T_c$的超导体。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Adam D. Smith et al. |
| 9 | **[Quantum secret sharing in tripartite superconducting network](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.13643v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting microwave quantum networks is a rapidly developing field, enabling distributed quantum computing and holding a promise for hybrid architectures in quantum internet. Quantum secret sharing (QSS) is one of the key protocols for multipartite quantum networks and can provide an unconditionally secure way to share quantum states among $n$ players. Using microwave two-mode squeezed states as an entanglement resource, we experimentally implement a QSS protocol with $n = 3$, where a subset of at least $k = 2$ players must collaborate to faithfully reconstruct the original secret state. We demonstrate reconstructed-state fidelities that surpass the asymptotic no-cloning threshold of $F_\textrm{nc} = 2/3$ and identify a parameter regime that allows for unconditionally secure communication in the presence of an omnipotent dishonest player. Furthermore, we experimentally explore inherent connections between QSS and other important quantum information processing tasks, such as quantum dense coding and elementary quantum error correction of channel erasures. Finally, we discuss extensions of QSS and its relation to the concept of blind quantum computing.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导微波量子网络是一个快速发展的领域，它能够实现分布式量子计算，并为量子互联网中的混合架构提供了前景。量子秘密共享（QSS）是多部分量子网络的关键协议之一，可以为$n$个参与者之间共享量子态提供无条件安全的方式。利用微波双模压缩态作为纠缠资源，我们实验性地实现了一个$n=3$的QSS协议，其中至少需要$k=2$个参与者的子集协作才能忠实地重建原始秘密态。我们展示了重建态保真度超过了渐近不可克隆阈值$F_\textrm{nc} = 2/3$，并确定了一个参数区域，该区域允许在存在全能型不诚实参与者的情况下进行无条件安全通信。此外，我们实验性地探索了QSS与其他重要量子信息处理任务（如量子密集编码和信道擦除的基本量子纠错）之间的内在联系。最后，我们讨论了QSS的扩展及其与盲量子计算概念的关系。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | W. K. Yam et al. |
| 10 | **[Theory of frozen flux in a narrow uniform superconducting strip after cooling in a small magnetic field](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.04961v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We analyze residual frozen flux in a long narrow superconducting strip cooled through its transition temperature $T_{c}$ in a small perpendicular magnetic field. This problem is relevant for the issue of trapped magnetic flux in superconducting electronic devices. During cooling, the low-temperature vortex configuration is formed at temperatures very close to $T_{c}$, where the flux density is determined by dynamic balance between the thermally-activated exits and entries of vortices over the geometrical energy barrier formed by the interaction with the strip edges and the Meissner screening current. In the field range between the minimum flux-expulsion field and the penetration field, the equilibrium flux density is finite due to thermal activation and rapidly decreases with decreasing temperature. During cooling, however, the escape rate decreases exponentially, and the vortex density falls out of equilibrium at a field-dependent freezing temperature $T_{\mathrm{fr}}$. We derive and solve the dynamic-balance equation for this process, which yields definite quantitative results for $T_{\mathrm{fr}}$ and the frozen vortex density. The relative freezing temperature $1\!-\!T_{\mathrm{fr}}/T_{c}$ exceeds the fluctuation width of the transition by a large logarithmic factor, rapidly increases when the magnetic field approaches the minimum flux-expulsion field, and logarithmically increases with decreasing cooling rate. The resulting frozen flux density has a very strong magnetic-field dependence which can be used to define the effective flux-expulsion magnetic field.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们分析了在垂直于长窄超导带的弱磁场中，将其冷却通过转变温度$T_{c}$时残留的冻结磁通。该问题与超导电子器件中捕获磁通的问题相关。在冷却过程中，低温涡旋构型在非常接近$T_{c}$的温度下形成，此时磁通密度由涡旋与带边缘相互作用及迈斯纳屏蔽电流形成的几何能垒上的热激活逃逸和进入之间的动态平衡决定。在最小磁通排出场和穿透场之间的场范围内，由于热激活，平衡磁通密度是有限的，并随温度降低而迅速减小。然而，在冷却过程中，逃逸率呈指数下降，涡旋密度在一个与场相关的冻结温度$T_{\mathrm{fr}}$处偏离平衡。我们推导并求解了该过程的动态平衡方程，得到了$T_{\mathrm{fr}}$和冻结涡旋密度的明确定量结果。相对冻结温度$1\!-\!T_{\mathrm{fr}}/T_{c}$超过转变的涨落宽度一个大的对数因子，当磁场接近最小磁通排出场时迅速增加，并随冷却速率降低而对数增加。由此产生的冻结磁通密度具有很强的磁场依赖性，可用于定义有效的磁通排出磁场。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Alexei E. Koshelev et al. |
| 11 | **[Superconducting properties of Nb$_{0.85}$Sc$_{0.15}$ film deposited by magnetron co-sputtering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.04956v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The technology has been developed for synthesizing Nb$_{1-x}$Sc$_x$ films using magnetron co-sputtering from Nb and Sc targets. The material synthesis was accompanied by structural characterization using X-ray diffraction and X-ray reflectometry methods, which enabled the determination of thickness, phase composition and crystal structure. We also analyzed the superconducting properties. The critical temperature $T_c$ was measured for samples with different concentarions of Sc and Nb. The maximum value of $T_c$ equal to 6.35 K was observed for sample with a scandium content of approximately 15 %, which was determined by Auger spectroscopy. Transport and magnetoresistive measurements were performed in microbridges with length of 50 $μ$m, width of 2 $μ$m, and thickness of 30 nm. The critical current density was as high as 2.5 $\text{ MA/cm}^{2}$. Magnetic measurements were performed with the field oriented perpendicular to the sample. The upper critical field $H_{c2}(0) = 3.2$ T, electron diffusion coefficient $D = 1.1$ $\text{cm}^{2}/s$, and coherence length $ξ_{GL} = 10.1$ nm. The synthesized Nb$_{1-x}$Sc$_x$ intermetallic compound shows promise for various functional cryogenic electronics devices. \keywords{NbSc; superconductor; microbridge}</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们开发了使用Nb和Sc靶材进行磁控共溅射合成Nb$_{1-x}$Sc$_x$薄膜的技术。材料合成过程中，使用X射线衍射和X射线反射率方法进行了结构表征，从而确定了厚度、相组成和晶体结构。我们还分析了超导特性。测量了不同Sc和Nb浓度样品的临界温度$T_c$。对于钪含量约为15%（通过俄歇能谱测定）的样品，观察到的$T_c$最大值为6.35 K。在长度为50 μm、宽度为2 μm、厚度为30 nm的微桥上进行了输运和磁阻测量。临界电流密度高达2.5 MA/cm²。在垂直于样品的磁场方向下进行了磁性测量。上临界场$H_{c2}(0) = 3.2$ T，电子扩散系数$D = 1.1$ cm²/s，相干长度$ξ_{GL} = 10.1$ nm。合成的Nb$_{1-x}$Sc$_x$金属间化合物有望用于各种功能性低温电子器件。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Paul Berezhnoy et al. |
| 12 | **[Superconducting non-volatile memory based on charge trapping and gate-controlled supercurrent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.17241v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting electronics holds great promise for energy-efficient high-performance and quantum computing, yet no superconducting memory has matched the performance of conventional semiconductor memories $-$ a long-standing bottleneck. Here we demonstrate a voltage-controlled, non-volatile superconducting memory that exploits two previously independent effects: gate-controlled supercurrent (GCS), the gate-voltage-induced suppression of the critical current $I_c$ in a superconducting constriction, and charge trapping in an Al$_2$O$_3$ dielectric. Trapped charges shift the threshold gate voltage required for $I_c$ suppression, defining two stable, well-separated $I_c$ states that can be used to store binary information. We demonstrate reliable non-destructive readout and reversible write/erase cycling over nearly fifty consecutive cycles with the device remaining in the zero-resistance state throughout. Stored information survives thermal cycling well above the superconducting transition temperature $T_c$, confirming true non-volatility $-$ a capability absent in all existing superconducting memories. We further discuss integration into a NAND architecture and show significant power-dissipation advantages over CMOS charge-trap flash memories.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导电子学在节能高性能计算和量子计算领域具有巨大前景，然而尚无超导存储器能够媲美传统半导体存储器的性能——这一长期存在的瓶颈。在此我们展示了一种电压控制的非易失性超导存储器，它利用了先前两个独立效应：栅控超流（GCS），即栅极电压诱导超导收缩区临界电流I_c的抑制，以及Al₂O₃介质中的电荷俘获。俘获电荷改变了I_c抑制所需的阈值栅极电压，定义了两种稳定且分离良好的I_c状态，可用于存储二进制信息。我们展示了可靠的非破坏性读取和近五十个连续循环的可逆写入/擦除操作，器件在整个过程中保持零电阻状态。存储信息在远高于超导转变温度T_c的热循环后仍能存活，证实了真正的非易失性——这是所有现有超导存储器所不具备的能力。我们进一步讨论了集成到NAND架构中的方案，并展示了相较于CMOS电荷陷阱闪存显著的功耗优势。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Leon Ruf et al. |
| 13 | **[Nodal superconductivity with spin-triplet component in a noncentrosymmetric weakly-correlated metal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.04742v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>In conventional superconductors, Cooper pairs form in an even-parity spin-singlet state. Noncentrosymmetric superconductors, which lack inversion symmetry, exhibit antisymmetric spin-orbit coupling (ASOC) that can combine even-parity spin-singlet and odd-parity spin-triplet pairs into a mixed-parity order parameter. Spin-triplet components are highly beneficial for superspintronic devices. Whether ASOC alone $-$ without strong electronic correlations $-$ is sufficient to generate a measurable triplet component remains a central open question. Here, we resolve this question in Nb$_{18}$Re$_{82}$ (Nb-Re), a weakly-correlated noncentrosymmetric metal whose superconducting pairing symmetry has been actively debated. Using low-temperature scanning tunneling spectroscopy on single crystals with four distinct crystallographic orientations, find a pronounced orientation-dependent anisotropy in the local density of states. Supported by a symmetry-constrained model, we show that the complete set of tunneling spectra requires a mixed-parity order parameter with the triplet amplitude reaching up to half of the singlet component. These results reconcile the conflicting reports in the literature on Nb-Re and demonstrate that ASOC is sufficient to foster a sizable spin-triplet component even without strong electronic correlations, suggesting that mixed-parity superconducting states may be more widespread than previously assumed. Since Nb-Re can be readily fabricated in thin-film form, these findings position it as an accessible platform for superspintronic devices and establish orientation-resolved tunneling spectroscopy as a general protocol for the detection of mixed-parity order parameters.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在常规超导体中，库珀对形成于宇称为偶的自旋单态。缺乏反演对称性的非中心对称超导体展现出反对称自旋轨道耦合（ASOC），该耦合可将宇称为偶的自旋单态与宇称为奇的自旋三重态对混合成宇称混合序参量。自旋三重态分量对超自旋电子学器件极为有利。仅凭ASOC本身——在无强电子关联条件下——是否足以产生可测量的三重态分量，仍是一个核心悬而未决的问题。本文中，我们在弱关联非中心对称金属Nb₁₈Re₈₂（Nb-Re）中解决了这一问题，该材料的超导配对对称性一直备受争议。通过对四种不同晶体取向的单晶进行低温扫描隧道谱学测量，我们发现局域态密度存在显著的取向依赖性各向异性。在对称性约束模型的支持下，我们证明完整的隧道谱需要一种宇称混合序参量，其中三重态振幅可达单态分量的一半。这些结果调和了文献中关于Nb-Re的矛盾报道，并证明即使没有强电子关联，ASOC也足以产生可观的自旋三重态分量，表明宇称混合超导态可能比先前认为的更为普遍。由于Nb-Re易于制备成薄膜形式，这些发现使其成为超自旋电子学器件的易得平台，并将取向分辨隧道谱学确立为探测宇称混合序参量的通用方法。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Marcel Strohmeier et al. |
| 14 | **[Altermagnetism and Superconductivity: A Short Historical Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.09170v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>This review is organized into three parts. In the first part, we explore the deep interconnections among three seemingly unrelated concepts in condensed matter physics: electronic liquid crystal phases, multipole expansions, and altermagnetism. At the heart of these phenomena lies a shared foundation: spin-momentum locking in the nonrelativistic regime. Originally proposed in the context of electronic liquid crystal phases, nonrelativistic spin-momentum locking was later elegantly incorporated into the formalism of multipole expansions. This framework can be further extended across multiple atomic sites, making it particularly effective for describing altermagnets, which host localized magnetic moments with anisotropic magnetization densities distributed over sublattices. In the second part, we examine superconducting phenomena associated with altermagnetism from three complementary perspectives. First, we investigate superconductivity associated with nonrelativistic spin-momentum locked Fermi surfaces, the unifying theme of the first part, highlighting a rich variety of unconventional superconducting states. These include finite-momentum pairing, $d$-wave and spin-triplet superconductivity, and topological Bogoliubov Fermi surfaces, among others. We then review superconductivity emerging from either static altermagnetic order or altermagnetic fluctuations. Finally, we discuss the possible competition and intertwining between altermagnetic order and superconductivity, illustrated using the repulsive Hubbard model. Additional related topics are addressed in the concluding part. Overall, this work offers both an accessible introduction to the newly identified magnetic order known as altermagnetism and a conceptual guide for researchers aiming to harness the ensuing unconventional superconductivity in the development of future quantum technologies.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>本综述分为三部分。第一部分，我们探讨凝聚态物理中三个看似无关的概念——电子液晶相、多极展开和交变磁性——之间的深层内在联系。这些现象的核心在于一个共同基础：非相对论框架下的自旋-动量锁定。非相对论性自旋-动量锁定最初在电子液晶相背景下提出，随后被优雅地纳入多极展开的形式体系中。该框架可进一步扩展到多个原子位点，使其特别适用于描述交变磁体——这类材料具有局域磁矩，且各向异性的磁化密度分布在子晶格上。第二部分，我们从三个互补视角审视与交变磁性相关的超导现象。首先，我们研究与第一部分统一主题——非相对论性自旋-动量锁定费米面——相关的超导电性，突显其丰富的非常规超导态，包括有限动量配对、d波和自旋三重态超导电性，以及拓扑Bogoliubov费米面等。随后，我们回顾从静态交变磁序或交变磁涨落中涌现的超导电性。最后，我们以排斥性哈伯德模型为例，讨论交变磁序与超导电性之间可能的竞争与交织。结论部分涉及其他相关主题。总体而言，本工作既为这一新近识别的磁序——交变磁性——提供了易于理解的入门介绍，也为旨在利用由此产生的非常规超导电性来发展未来量子技术的研究人员提供了概念性指南。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Zhao Liu et al. |
| 15 | **[Progress of ambient-pressure superconductivity in bilayer nickelate thin films](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.11235v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>This review summarizes recent progress of ambient-pressure superconductivity in bilayer nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin films, a major advancement following the discovery of high-pressure superconductivity in bulk La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$. First, we explain how epitaxial strain engineering enables ambient-pressure superconductivity in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin films, with compressive strain from substrates like SrLaAlO$_4$ stabilizing superconductivity. Next, we review experimental characterizations of related systems, with particular emphasis on ARPES measurements that have shown conflicting Fermi surface topologies. We then discuss progress in increasing the superconducting transition temperature $T_c$. Finally, we summarize theoretical studies of the electronic structure and pairing symmetry of La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin films. Together, these advances establish bilayer nickelate thin films as a highly tunable and promising platform for exploring high-$T_c$ superconductivity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>本综述总结了双层镍酸盐La₃Ni₂O₇薄膜常压超导电性的最新进展，这是在块材La₃Ni₂O₇中发现高压超导电性后的一项重大突破。首先，我们解释了外延应变工程如何在La₃Ni₂O₇薄膜中实现常压超导电性，其中来自SrLaAlO₄等衬底的压应变稳定了超导态。接着，我们回顾了相关体系的实验表征，特别强调了角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）测量——该测量显示了相互矛盾的费米面拓扑。然后，我们讨论了提高超导转变温度T_c的进展。最后，我们总结了关于La₃Ni₂O₇薄膜电子结构和配对对称性的理论研究。这些进展共同确立了双层镍酸盐薄膜作为一个高度可调且前景广阔的平台，用于探索高温超导电性。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Wenyuan Qiu et al. |
| 16 | **[Possible Enhancement of Superconductivity in Ambient-Pressure La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ Thin Film](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02685v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>As an unconventional superconducting system capable of reaching 60 K under ambient pressure, the La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin film superconductor has recently become a focal point in the field of superconductivity, calling for further theoretical exploration of its possible pairing mechanisms. In this work, we employ the fluctuation exchange (FLEX) approximation to systematically analyze the superconducting properties of a previously proposed two-site, two-orbital model for the La$_3$Ni$2$O$7$ thin film in the weakly correlated regime, with particular emphasis on its dependence on hole doping. Through a more detailed examination of the Fermi-surface topology, we find that when a $δ$ pocket composed of the $d_{z^{2}}$ antibonding orbital emerges near the $Γ$ point, its nesting with the $γ$ pocket, together with the nesting between the $α$ and $β$ pockets, leads to a mutual enhancement of $s{\pm}$-wave pairing at the corresponding wave vector. Furthermore, we propose that this nesting-driven enhancement of spin-fluctuation-induced pairing may provide a viable mechanism for enhancing superconductivity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>作为一种在常压下可达60K的非常规超导体系，La₃Ni₂O₇薄膜超导体近期已成为超导领域的研究焦点，亟需对其可能的配对机制进行进一步的理论探索。在本工作中，我们采用涨落交换（FLEX）近似，系统分析了先前提出的用于描述弱关联区域La₃Ni₂O₇薄膜的双位点、双轨道模型的超导性质，特别关注其对空穴掺杂的依赖性。通过对费米面拓扑的更详细考察，我们发现，当由d_{z²}反键轨道构成的δ口袋在Γ点附近出现时，其与γ口袋的嵌套，连同α与β口袋之间的嵌套，共同导致在相应波矢处s±波配对的相互增强。此外，我们提出，这种由嵌套驱动的自旋涨落诱导配对的增强，可能为增强超导电性提供一种可行的机制。</p></details> | 2026-06-03 | Yichen Hua et al. |
| 17 | **[Bipolar-doped superconducting infinite-layer cuprates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03981v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Distilling the intrinsic physics of the superconducting CuO2 plane from the complexities of charge-reservoir layers is a defining challenge in high-temperature superconductivity. While superconducting electron-doped infinite-layer cuprates have been synthesized, controllable and uniform hole doping has long remained elusive despite exploratory attempts, limiting spectroscopic insights. Here, we realize bipolar doping across infinite-layer (Sr,Eu)CuO2 and (Ca,Li)CuO2+δ single-crystalline thin films, mapping the electronic phase diagram. Both electron- and hole-doped films show pronounced electrical resistance anisotropy, indicating the quasi-two-dimensional nature of the CuO2 planes. Angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy across electron- and hole-doped regimes reveals persistent antiferromagnetic band folding coexisting with superconductivity. Remarkably, at a hole doping ~0.07 determined by Luttinger volume, the antiferromagnetic folding emerges from Fermi arcs within the film's single Fermi surface, with the onset superconducting transition temperature exceeding 60 K. These findings redefine the interplay between magnetic order and superconductivity and establish a definitive platform to investigate the intrinsic mechanism of high-temperature superconducting cuprates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>从电荷库层的复杂性中提炼出超导CuO₂面的本征物理，是高温超导电性研究中的一个决定性挑战。尽管超导电子掺杂无限层铜氧化物已被合成，但可控且均匀的空穴掺杂——尽管已有探索性尝试——长期以来仍难以实现，限制了光谱学研究的深入。在此，我们在无限层(Sr,Eu)CuO₂和(Ca,Li)CuO₂+δ单晶薄膜中实现了双极掺杂，并绘制了电子相图。电子和空穴掺杂的薄膜均显示出显著的电阻各向异性，表明CuO₂面的准二维特性。跨越电子和空穴掺杂区域的角分辨光电子能谱揭示了与超导电性共存的持续反铁磁能带折叠。值得注意的是，在由Luttinger体积确定的空穴掺杂量约为0.07时，反铁磁折叠从薄膜单一费米面内的费米弧中涌现，而超导起始转变温度超过60K。这些发现重新定义了磁有序与超导电性之间的相互作用，并为研究高温超导铜氧化物的本征机制建立了一个确定性的平台。</p></details> | 2026-06-02 | Fengzhe Wang et al. |
| 18 | **[Parametrically induced strong coupling between a superconducting quantum circuit and a solid-state spin ensemble](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03897v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Efficient quantum state transfer between superconducting circuits and solid-state spins would unlock high-coherence quantum memories for superconducting quantum processors. We demonstrate dynamically controlled strong coupling between a Josephson circuit and a rare-earth spin ensemble. Using a parametric pump, we realize on-demand coupling of several MHz, which will enable faithful state transfer between quantum circuits and spins. Our architecture enables quantum control of spin ensembles, and paves the way for hybrid memories with coherence far beyond those of superconducting circuits alone.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在超导电路与固态自旋之间实现高效量子态转移，将为超导量子处理器解锁高相干量子存储器。我们展示了约瑟夫森电路与稀土自旋系综之间的动态可控强耦合。通过参量泵浦，我们实现了数兆赫兹的按需耦合，这将使得量子电路与自旋之间的保真态转移成为可能。我们的架构实现了对自旋系综的量子控制，并为相干性远超纯超导电路的混合存储器铺平了道路。</p></details> | 2026-06-02 | Alejandro E. Baptista et al. |
| 19 | **[Beyond Single-Shot Fidelity: Chernoff-Based Throughput Optimization in Superconducting Qubit Readout](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.22174v5)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Single-shot fidelity is the standard benchmark for superconducting qubit readout, yet it does not directly minimize the wall-clock time needed to certify a quantum state. We treat the dispersive measurement record as a stochastic communication channel and compute the classical Chernoff information governing the multi-shot error exponent, using a trajectory model that incorporates T1 relaxation with full cavity memory. The integration time that maximizes single-shot fidelity and the time that minimizes total certification time do not coincide. For representative transmon parameters and hardware overheads, the throughput-optimal window is longer, cutting certification time by roughly 9-11%, with the gain saturating near 1.13x in the high-readout-power and high-overhead regime. Benchmarking the extracted classical information against the unit-efficiency Gaussian Chernoff limit defines an information-extraction efficiency: dispersive schemes capture ~45% at short integration times, dropping to eta_info(tau_rate) ~ 12% at tau_rate ~ 1.22 us as T1-induced trajectory smearing accumulates. These results connect readout calibration directly to the operational objective of minimizing certification time in high-throughput superconducting processors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>单发保真度是超导量子比特读出的标准基准，但它并不能直接最小化认证量子态所需的实际时间。我们将色散测量记录视为一个随机通信信道，并利用包含完整腔记忆及T1弛豫的轨迹模型，计算了控制多发射击误差指数的经典Chernoff信息。最大化单发保真度的积分时间与最小化总认证时间的时间并不一致。对于代表性的transmon参数和硬件开销，吞吐量最优的窗口更长，可将认证时间缩短约9-11%，在高读出功率和高开销区域，增益饱和接近1.13倍。将提取的经典信息与单位效率高斯Chernoff极限进行对比，定义了一个信息提取效率：在短积分时间下，色散方案捕获约45%的信息，而在T1诱导的轨迹模糊累积下，在tau_rate约1.22微秒时，效率降至eta_info(tau_rate)约12%。这些结果将读出校准直接与高吞吐量超导处理器中最小化认证时间的操作目标联系起来。</p></details> | 2026-06-02 | Sinan Bugu et al. |
| 20 | **[Enhanced superconductivity in atomically thin noble metals: From quantum confinement to interface-induced Lifshitz transition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03663v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Unlocking superconductivity in intrinsically non-superconducting noble metals (Au, Ag, Cu) represents a fundamental challenge in low-dimensional physics. While quantum confinement in the atomically thin limit is known to trigger emergent superconductivity, strategies to amplify this marginal effect to experimentally accessible temperatures remain a key open question. Using first-principles calculations, we establish a unified framework linking intrinsic confinement effects with interface engineering in noble metal films. We reveal that intrinsic superconductivity is element-specific: it is suppressed in Ag by a stiff phonon spectrum, but emerges in trilayer Cu ($T_{\rm C} \approx 0.78$ K) and pentalayer Au ($0.63$ K) driven by confinement-induced density-of-states (DOS) enhancement and phonon softening, respectively. In h-BN/Cu(111) heterostructures, $T_{\rm C}$ is critically dictated by the interfacial stacking configuration. We identify the thermodynamically stable N-bonded interface as a reliable platform for accessible superconductivity ($T_{\rm C} \approx 3.23$ K), whereas manipulating the system into a metastable B-bonded configuration boosts $T_{\rm C}$ to $7.00$ K. This enhancement originates from a B-bonded-induced Lifshitz transition, where the Fermi surface forms a tangential contact with the Brillouin zone boundary at the M point, enhancing electron-phonon coupling beyond DOS effects. Our work unifies the understanding of intrinsic two-dimensional superconductivity with atomistic interface design, offering a blueprint for functionalizing noble metals as emergent superconductors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在本质上非超导的贵金属（金、银、铜）中解锁超导性，是低维物理学中的一个基本挑战。虽然已知原子级薄极限下的量子约束会触发涌现超导性，但如何将这种边缘效应放大到实验可达到的温度，仍然是一个关键未解问题。通过第一性原理计算，我们建立了一个统一框架，将贵金属薄膜中的内在约束效应与界面工程联系起来。我们发现，内在超导性具有元素特异性：在银中，由于刚性的声子谱而被抑制；但在三层铜（Tc约0.78 K）和五层金（0.63 K）中，分别由约束诱导的态密度增强和声子软化驱动而出现。在h-BN/Cu(111)异质结构中，Tc关键地取决于界面堆叠构型。我们确定了热力学稳定的N键合界面是实现可及超导性（Tc约3.23 K）的可靠平台，而将系统操控至亚稳态的B键合构型可将Tc提升至7.00 K。这种增强源于B键合诱导的Lifshitz相变，其中费米面在M点与布里渊区边界形成切向接触，从而增强了超越态密度效应的电子-声子耦合。我们的工作统一了对本征二维超导性的理解与原子级界面设计，为将贵金属功能化为涌现超导体提供了蓝图。</p></details> | 2026-06-02 | Chun-Jie Zhang et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Probing the scale-free hierarchy of the $p=3$ spherical spin glass via persistent Langevin dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02239v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>How does a persistent random walker perceive a complex energy landscape? We address this question by studying the persistent Langevin dynamics of the p=3 spherical spin glass, a paradigmatic mean-field model with a scale-free hierarchical landscape. By tuning the persistence time tau_p, which controls the walker's inertia and effectively sets its energy resolution delta E proportional to 1/tau_p, we measure the energy correlation time tau_corr. At temperature T=1.0, we find tau_corr scales as tau_p to the power alpha with alpha = 0.337 plus or minus 0.035 for tau_p in the range [2,32] (for N=64), in excellent agreement with the Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ) universality class prediction alpha = 1/3. Finite-size scaling using N = 16,32,48,64,128 yields the thermodynamic limit alpha(infinity) = 0.3333 plus or minus 0.0134, fully consistent with 1/3. Thus, tau_p acts as a tunable probe that reveals the predicted scale-free hierarchy of the landscape. Moreover, the temperature dependence alpha(T) for T = 0.5,1.0,1.5,2.0 exhibits a clear U-shaped curve, identifying three dynamical regimes: ballistic/inertial, KPZ, and noise-dominated. Our results establish persistent Langevin dynamics as a powerful tool for uncovering hidden landscape topology and demonstrate that the p=3 spherical spin glass belongs to the KPZ universality class.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>一个具有持久性的随机游走者如何感知复杂的能量景观？我们通过研究p=3球面自旋玻璃（一种具有无标度层次景观的典型平均场模型）的持久朗之万动力学来探讨这一问题。通过调节持久时间tau_p（它控制游走者的惯性，并有效设定其能量分辨率delta E与1/tau_p成正比），我们测量了能量相关时间tau_corr。在温度T=1.0时，我们发现对于tau_p在[2,32]范围内（N=64），tau_corr按tau_p的alpha次方标度，其中alpha = 0.337 ± 0.035，与Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ)普适类预测的alpha = 1/3高度吻合。使用N = 16,32,48,64,128的有限尺寸标度得到热力学极限alpha(∞) = 0.3333 ± 0.0134，与1/3完全一致。因此，tau_p作为一种可调探针，揭示了景观中预测的无标度层次结构。此外，温度依赖性alpha(T)在T = 0.5,1.0,1.5,2.0时呈现清晰的U形曲线，识别出三个动力学区域：弹道/惯性区、KPZ区和噪声主导区。我们的结果确立了持久朗之万动力学作为揭示隐藏景观拓扑结构的强大工具，并证明了p=3球面自旋玻璃属于KPZ普适类。</p></details> | 2026-06-01 | Li Zhenpeng et al. |
| 2 | **[Ground State Excitations and Energy Fluctuations in Short-Range Spin Glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.27507v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study the stability of ground states in the Edwards-Anderson Ising spin glass in dimensions two and higher against perturbations of a single coupling. After reviewing the concepts of critical droplets, flexibilities and metastates, we show that, in any dimension, a certain kind of critical droplet with space-filling (i.e., positive spatial density) boundary does not exist in ground states generated by coupling-independent boundary conditions. Using this we show that if incongruent ground states exist in any dimension, the variance of their energy difference restricted to finite volumes scales proportionally to the volume. This in turn is used to prove that a metastate generated by (e.g.) periodic boundary conditions is unique and supported on a single pair of spin-reversed ground states in two dimensions. We further show that any excitation above an infinite-volume ground state with a positive-density interface must have the property that its energy difference with the ground state in a restricted volume diverges as the square root of the restricted volume.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了二维及更高维Edwards-Anderson伊辛自旋玻璃中基态对单一耦合扰动的稳定性。在回顾临界滴、柔性和亚稳态的概念后，我们证明，在任何维度中，由耦合无关边界条件生成的基态中不存在具有空间填充（即正空间密度）边界的某种临界滴。利用这一点，我们证明如果在任何维度中存在不一致的基态，则它们在有限体积内能量差值的方差与体积成比例标度。这进而被用来证明由（例如）周期边界条件生成的亚稳态是唯一的，并且在二维中支撑在一对自旋反转的基态上。我们进一步证明，任何具有正密度界面的无限体积基态之上的激发，必须具有这样的性质：其在受限体积内与基态的能量差值随受限体积的平方根发散。</p></details> | 2026-06-01 | C. M. Newman et al. |
| 3 | **[Cosm: Collective Switched Motion for Fast and Accurate Sparse Ising Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.30355v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We introduce Collective Switched Motion (Cosm), a dynamical system-based heuristic algorithm. Cosm combines locally interacting continuous circular variables with novel global coordination rules that facilitate collective dynamics. Pairwise interactions occur sequentially over a set of conflict-free edge partitions, resulting in an interaction network that switches periodically. Unlike conventional gradient-based approaches, Cosm employs structured, non-smooth switching dynamics with finite-magnitude interactions that sustain collective fluctuations and promote exploration beyond local minima. A correlated perturbation mechanism further promotes coordinated cluster motion in the circular phase space. On the three largest Ising problems from the Gset suite, which have 10,000-20,000 variables and represent 2D spin glasses, Cosm attains the optimal solutions (verified with an exact solver) heuristically for the first time. On two large bounded-degree non-lattice graph instances, Cosm reduces the state-of-the-art times-to-target from hundreds of hours to 36-303 s. Results on benchmark problems with tuned hardness suggest favorable scaling relative to previously characterized dynamical solvers. These results suggest that Cosm's synthesis of local interactions, structured switching dynamics, and global coordination provides an effective computational framework for sparse optimization.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们引入集体切换运动（Cosm），一种基于动力系统的启发式算法。Cosm将局部相互作用的连续圆形变量与促进集体动力学的新型全局协调规则相结合。成对相互作用在一组无冲突边划分上顺序发生，产生一个周期性切换的交互网络。与传统的基于梯度的方法不同，Cosm采用结构化的、非光滑的切换动力学，具有有限幅度的相互作用，维持集体涨落并促进超越局部极小值的探索。一种相关扰动机制进一步促进了圆形相空间中的协调簇运动。在Gset套件中三个最大的伊辛问题上（具有10,000-20,000个变量，代表二维自旋玻璃），Cosm首次启发式地达到了最优解（经精确求解器验证）。在两个大型有界度非晶格图实例上，Cosm将最先进的求解时间从数百小时缩短至36-303秒。在具有调谐硬度的基准问题上的结果表明，相对于先前表征的动力学求解器，其具有有利的标度性。这些结果表明，Cosm对局部交互、结构化切换动力学和全局协调的综合，为稀疏优化提供了一个有效的计算框架。</p></details> | 2026-06-01 | Kenneth M. Zick et al. |
| 4 | **[The Longest Increasing Subsequence Problem revisited](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01501v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The Longest Increasing Subsequence problem - a classic combinatorial challenge with deep connections to statistical mechanics- exhibits a rich thermodynamic landscape. Introducing a temperature we identify two distinct energy scales: A Schottky-like crossover at T_cross and a condensation transition at T_cond, below which the number of maximum-length configurations becomes sub-exponential in system size. We also show that despite the existence of polynomial-time dynamic programming algorithms for the ground state, local Monte Carlo dynamics, after sudden quenches at low temperatures, become trapped in metastable state configurations displaying characteristic glassy signatures: two-step relaxation, persistent dynamical overlaps and aging. On the other hand, logarithmic annealing tracks equilibrium down to the ground state. These results establish that thermodynamic sparsity - not energetic barriers - can render local search dynamically intractable, positioning the LIS problem as a bridge between exactly solvable optimization and glassy spin-glass phenomenology.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>最长递增子序列问题——一个与统计力学有深刻联系的经典组合挑战——展现出丰富的热力学景观。通过引入温度，我们识别出两个不同的能量尺度：T_cross处的肖特基型交叉和T_cond处的凝聚相变，在T_cond以下，最大长度构型的数量在系统尺寸上呈次指数增长。我们还表明，尽管存在用于基态的多项式时间动态规划算法，局部蒙特卡洛动力学在低温快速淬火后，会陷入具有典型玻璃态特征的亚稳态构型：两步弛豫、持续动力学重叠和老化。另一方面，对数退火可追踪平衡态直至基态。这些结果确立了热力学稀疏性——而非能量势垒——可以使局部搜索在动力学上难以处理，将LIS问题定位为精确可解优化与玻璃态自旋玻璃现象学之间的桥梁。</p></details> | 2026-05-31 | Silvio Franz et al. |
| 5 | **[Probabilistic Computers for MIMO Detection: From Sparsification to 2D Parallel Tempering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.09037v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Probabilistic computers built from p-bits offer a promising path for combinatorial optimization, but the dense connectivity required by real-world problems scales poorly in hardware. Here, we address this through graph sparsification with auxiliary copy variables and demonstrate two fully on-chip parallel tempering solvers on an FPGA. Targeting MIMO detection, a dense, NP-hard problem central to wireless communications, we first fit 11 temperature replicas of a 128-node sparsified system (1,408 p-bits) on-chip and achieve bit error rates significantly below conventional linear detectors on $64 \times 64$ BPSK MIMO. We report complete end-to-end solution times of 3~ms per instance, including all loading, sampling, readout, and verification overheads. ASIC projections in 7~nm technology indicate 103~MHz operation at 285.8~mW, suggesting that massive parallelism across multiple chips could approach the throughput demands of next-generation wireless systems. Sparsification, however, introduces a sharp sensitivity to the copy-constraint strength $P$ that requires manual tuning. To eliminate this bottleneck, we utilize Two-Dimensional Parallel Tempering (2D-PT), which exchanges replicas across both temperature ($β$) and constraint ($P$) dimensions. On Sherrington--Kirkpatrick spin glasses, 2D-PT converges roughly $250\times$ faster than optimally tuned 1D-PT, and on $128 \times 128$ MIMO it reaches zero bit errors at high SNR where 1D-PT exhibits an error floor. We further validate 2D-PT entirely on-chip with 54 replicas (1,728 p-bits) on a $16 \times 16$ MIMO instance, where it tracks the maximum-likelihood bound in just 50 Monte Carlo steps -- $10\times$ fewer than 1D-PT -- at projected 111~MHz and 124~mW in 7~nm. Together, these results establish an on-chip p-bit architecture and a scalable, tuning-free algorithmic framework for dense combinatorial optimization.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>由p比特构建的概率计算机为组合优化提供了一条有前景的路径，但现实问题所需的密集连接性在硬件中扩展性较差。在此，我们通过带有辅助复制变量的图稀疏化来解决这一问题，并在FPGA上演示了两个完全片上并行回火求解器。针对MIMO检测（一个密集的、NP难的无线通信核心问题），我们首先将128节点稀疏化系统（1,408个p比特）的11个温度副本集成到芯片上，并在64 × 64 BPSK MIMO上实现了显著低于传统线性检测器的误码率。我们报告了每个实例的完整端到端求解时间为3毫秒，包括所有加载、采样、读出和验证开销。7纳米技术的ASIC预测表明，在285.8毫瓦功耗下可实现103兆赫兹运行，这表明跨多个芯片的大规模并行化可能接近下一代无线系统的吞吐量需求。然而，稀疏化引入了对复制约束强度P的尖锐敏感性，需要手动调谐。为消除这一瓶颈，我们利用二维并行回火（2D-PT），它在温度（β）和约束（P）两个维度上交换副本。在Sherrington-Kirkpatrick自旋玻璃上，2D-PT的收敛速度比最优调谐的1D-PT快约250倍；在128 × 128 MIMO上，它在高信噪比下达到零误码率，而1D-PT则表现出错误平层。我们进一步在16 × 16 MIMO实例上，用54个副本（1,728个p比特）完全在片上验证了2D-PT，它仅需50个蒙特卡洛步即可跟踪最大似然界——比1D-PT少10倍——在7纳米工艺下预计运行频率为111兆赫兹，功耗为124毫瓦。这些结果共同建立了一种片上p比特架构和一种可扩展、免调谐的密集组合优化算法框架。</p></details> | 2026-05-31 | M Mahmudul Hasan Sajeeb et al. |
| 6 | **[Anisotropic Kitaev Spin Glass in Li$_{2}$Ru$_{x}$Ir$_{1-x}$O$_{3}$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.22280v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Kitaev iridates have emerged as an important class of spin-orbit-entangled quantum materials in which bond-directional exchange interactions generate strong magnetic frustration and unconventional correlated states. Rather than realizing simple ordered magnets, members of the alpha,beta,gamma-Li2IrO3 family exhibit fragile and highly anisotropic magnetic behavior, including incommensurate counter-rotating order, strong field sensitivity, and pressure-driven electronic reconstruction. These phenomena place the iridates in close proximity to the Kitaev quantum spin liquid (QSL) regime, while simultaneously revealing the importance of competing interactions, lattice distortions, and spin-orbit-assisted hopping processes beyond the ideal Kitaev limit. Understanding how chemical substitution perturbs these competing interactions provides a route toward probing the underlying frustrated magnetic state. Here, we study single crystals of beta-Li2RuxIr1-xO3 with dilute Ru substitution, x<~10%. Through a combination of magnetometry, resonant elastic X-ray scattering, ac-heat capacity, and muon spin relaxation/rotation, we show that weak magnetic disorder continuously suppresses the incommensurate antiferromagnetic ground state without stabilizing an alternative long-range ordered phase. Instead, the system evolves into a bulk static spin glass characterized by slow relaxation, aging behavior, and frozen local magnetic fields. Despite the loss of long-range magnetic order, the glassy state retains substantial directional anisotropy without significant distortion to the honeycomb lattice, suggesting that disorder freezes spins within a still-active bond-directional exchange environment. In this picture, dilute Ru substitution provides a controlled pathway into an anisotropic Kitaev spin glass regime that preserves essential fingerprints of the underlying Kitaev exchange network.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>基塔耶夫铱氧化物已成为一类重要的自旋-轨道纠缠量子材料，其中键方向交换相互作用会产生强磁阻挫和非常规关联态。α、β、γ-Li2IrO3家族成员并非实现简单有序磁体，而是表现出脆弱且高度各向异性的磁性行为，包括非公度反向旋转序、强场敏感性以及压力驱动的电子重构。这些现象使铱氧化物接近基塔耶夫量子自旋液体区域，同时揭示了超越理想基塔耶夫极限的竞争相互作用、晶格畸变和自旋-轨道辅助跃迁过程的重要性。理解化学替代如何扰动这些竞争相互作用，为探索底层阻挫磁态提供了途径。本文研究了Ru稀释替代（x<~10%）的β-Li2RuxIr1-xO3单晶。通过磁学测量、共振弹性X射线散射、交流热容和μ子自旋弛豫/旋转等综合手段，我们证明弱磁无序持续抑制非公度反铁磁基态，但并未稳定其他长程有序相。相反，系统演变为体静态自旋玻璃态，其特征为慢弛豫、老化行为和冻结局域磁场。尽管长程磁序消失，玻璃态仍保持显著的方向各向异性，且蜂窝晶格无明显畸变，表明无序在仍活跃的键方向交换环境中冻结了自旋。在此图景中，稀释Ru替代提供了一条进入各向异性基塔耶夫自旋玻璃态的可控途径，该玻璃态保留了底层基塔耶夫交换网络的基本特征。</p></details> | 2026-05-30 | Mayia A. Vranas et al. |
| 7 | **[Estimates of ground state energies for the quantum SK and 2D-EA model, using deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo mean-field annealing dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29875v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We perform a large scale simulation of quantum annealing in the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick (SK) spin glass up to a system size $N=40000$ to estimate its ground state energy using the deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo mean-field Ising dynamics, extending the earlier results (reported in Eur. Phys. J. B {\bf 98}, 226 (2025)). Here we numerically solve the deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo annealing dynamics to obtain the spin configurations and subsequently the ground state energy for a given system size at the end of the annealing (to the desired quantum system at the corresponding values of the transverse field), starting from a quantum paramagnetic state. The method shows high efficiency, with an overall algorithmic cost of $O(N^3)$ in estimating the energy of the ground state. We later extend this method to study the ground state energy of the Edwards-Anderson (EA) spin glass on a square lattice.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用德热纳-铃木-久保平均场伊辛动力学，对谢林顿-柯克帕特里克自旋玻璃系统进行了大规模量子退火模拟，系统尺寸高达 \(N=40000\)，以估算其基态能量，该研究扩展了先前的结果（发表于《欧洲物理杂志B》第98卷，226页，2025年）。在此，我们通过数值求解德热纳-铃木-久保退火动力学，从量子顺磁态出发，获得退火结束时（对应于相应横向场值下的目标量子系统）给定系统尺寸的自旋构型，进而得到基态能量。该方法效率较高，估算基态能量的总体算法复杂度为 \(O(N^3)\)。随后，我们将该方法推广至研究正方晶格上爱德华兹-安德森自旋玻璃的基态能量。</p></details> | 2026-05-28 | Soumyaditya Das et al. |
| 8 | **[Landscape-Similarity-Guided Optimization in Divide-and-Conquer QAOA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.21689v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Across diverse synthetic and real-world interaction graphs, the variational landscapes of reduced Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) instances obtained via variable freezing exhibit a robust universality. Leveraging this structure, we introduce Doubly Optimized QAOA (DO-QAOA), which lowers runtime and quantum measurement overhead while maintaining a competitive approximation ratio gap (ARG). Adapting the replica-overlap framework of spin-glass physics, we define a landscape-overlap order parameter $q$ to quantify geometric correlations between energy landscapes, revealing a sharp landscape-similarity transition as graph connectivity is tuned. Notwithstanding this transition, the dominant convex features of nearly all conditioned sub-instances remain aligned across both phases. Exploiting this persistence, DO-QAOA collapses the nominal $2^m$ reduced instances generated by freezing $m$ qubits into $K = O(1)$ effective landscape classes, eliminating the exponential proliferation in $m$. By leveraging landscape structure, DO-QAOA provides a scalable route to hybrid quantum-classical optimization under realistic hardware constraints, with potential applicability across variational quantum algorithms.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在多种合成与真实交互图中，通过变量冻结获得的约化量子近似优化算法实例的变分景观展现出稳健的普适性。利用这一结构，我们提出了双重优化量子近似优化算法，该算法在保持有竞争力的近似比间隙的同时，降低了运行时间和量子测量开销。借鉴自旋玻璃物理中的副本重叠框架，我们定义了一个景观重叠序参量 \(q\)，用于量化能量景观之间的几何相关性，并揭示了随着图连通性的调节而出现的尖锐景观相似性转变。尽管存在这一转变，几乎所有条件化子实例的主要凸特征在两个相中仍保持一致。利用这一持久性，双重优化量子近似优化算法将由冻结 \(m\) 个量子比特生成的标称 \(2^m\) 个约化实例坍缩为 \(K = O(1)\) 个有效景观类别，从而消除了随 \(m\) 的指数级增长。通过利用景观结构，双重优化量子近似优化算法为在现实硬件约束下实现可扩展的混合量子经典优化提供了一条路径，并具有跨变分量子算法的潜在适用性。</p></details> | 2026-05-28 | Sokea Sang et al. |
